StoreProfile.title: StoreProfile
StoreProfile.description: Store profile definition including billing, subscription state, location, and metadata.

name.description: Name of the coffee shop or store

settlementAccount.description: Connected payout wallet or account details

logoIcon.description: Icon type identifier for store profile

themeColor.description: Vibrant custom hexadecimal theme color code

subscriptionMonthsPaid.description: Count of consecutive paid subscription months

subscriptionStartDate.description: Date when active subscription was initialized

floorCount.description: Total number of floors designed inside layout

Table.title: Table
Table.description: A dynamic physical table layout inside the store.

label.description: Visual name label of the table (e.g., T-1)

x.description: Horizontal percentage coordinate on the layout

y.description: Vertical percentage coordinate on the layout

status.description: Live occupancy state of the table

currentOrderId.description: Reference ID to the current active order

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Detailed order transactional record including items, status, total, and timestamp.

tableId.description: Table identifier associated with the order

items.description: Detailed list of ordered items, prices, and quantities

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp indicating when order was placed

status.description: Live processing state of the order

DailySummary.title: DailySummary
DailySummary.description: Aggregated sales summary for a specific calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD).

revenue.description: Total sales volume registered during the day

profit.description: Net business profits calculated after ingredient cost deductions

orderCount.description: Total count of paid transactions finalized during the day

stores/{storeId}.description: The root document representing a specific store configuration and metadata.

stores/{storeId}/tables/{tableId}.description: Dynamic physical table mapping subcollection for a store.

stores/{storeId}/orders/{orderId}.description: Receipts and active kitchen ticket collection.

stores/{storeId}/daily_summaries/{dateSt.description: Daily aggregated sales metrics for real-time reporting.
